observation: First malicious transaction occurred at 10:14:35 UTC on January 30, 2024
market_health_interpretation: Transaction-bounded exploits need real-time anomaly detection

observation: Reports cited about $6.5 million lost, including 1,800 ETH and 2.2 million MIM
market_health_interpretation: Debt-ledger manipulation became a material asset and liability event

observation: Repayments reduced recorded debt while real economic exposure remained
market_health_interpretation: Solvency checks should reconcile recorded debt against actual liabilities

observation: MIM briefly traded below its dollar target after exploit reports
market_health_interpretation: Protocol exploits can transmit into stablecoin liquidity and confidence

observation: Abracadabra said the DAO treasury would buy back MIM from the market and burn it
market_health_interpretation: Peg defense relies on treasury depth and response speed

observation: Final debt and solvency checks were ineffective after recorded debt was manipulated
market_health_interpretation: Market-health dashboards should track invariant drift, not only collateral prices
